task:
Configure the Pixel History panel for a debug workflow (always show failed fragments, color entries by primitive ID, and enable shader debugger auto-step) by editing /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config (a flat JSON document). Apply all of the following edits in a single save:

1. Set `"PixelHistory_ShowFailures"` to `true`.
2. Set `"PixelHistory_ColorByPrimitive"` to `true`.
3. Set `"ShaderViewer_AutoStep"` to `true`.

The top-level `"rdocConfigData": 1` marker must still be present after saving. Do not remove or rename any other key.
